summary_context: Surgically removed the leaveType select dropdown from the Edit Work Time popup in daily-reports/list.tsx. Added a useEffect hook to automatically synchronize the leaveType state based on the presence of a medical certificate file/url (setting to 'Paid' if a file is attached, and 'Unpaid' if absent), satisfying the backend TaskService constraints. Simplified the top right badge label to just display 'ลา' and verified type-safety. Also prepared the implementation plan for role-based notifications.
